title: ricinus communis subvar. blumeanus
intro: Ricinus communis subvar. blumeanus, a variant of the common castor oil plant, is a perennial shrub native to tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ricinus communis subvar. blumeanus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant include extracts, oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, depending on the specific application and individual needs.
